scope: root contracts/docs and audit evidence only; no runtime topology changes, no feature delivery, no deploy/release, no cloud-dev, no generated-build expansion, no root implementation dirt

contracts_docs.reason: bounded canonical contract set for Director delivery, gmd-dev action, generated-build admission policy, and index/readme updates

audit_receipts.reason: bounded evidence batch for Ultra Plan 8/9 generated-build/read-only-governance/topology work; keeping as untracked root dirt creates operator ambiguity

root_implementation_dirt.reason: root scripts/amof is non-canonical and hard-fails by guardrail; wanted logic must be reapplied to repos/amof

assistant_deletion_residue.reason: requires separate assistant repo retirement/import decision

config_drift.reason: runtime/config-bearing changes are not part of this publication batch

root_tests.reason: must be reviewed against canonical repos/amof test location before landing

publish_strategy.remote_strategy: clean OpenSandbox branch off origin/main to avoid known main-helper PAT-shaped secret-scanning ancestry
